category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides binary diff and differential compression tools; official README describes VCDIFF/RFC 3284 delta compression
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitHub README heading identify the project as Xdelta/xdelta
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and points users to command-line usage and the wiki directory
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a non-empty value, so repo is returned as null per instructions
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify binary diff, differential compression, and VCDIFF/RFC 3284 functionality
